response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:11: Shiranui Flare plays 'Second Heaven' in Pop'n music. 2. 02:11-03:13: Talk/interlude. 3. 03:13-04:56: Shiranui Flare and Omaru Polka perform 'Daikenkai' (大見解). 4. Searched for lyrics for both songs using original artist/composer. Found reliable lyrics on j-lyric.net and uta-net.com.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a VTuber, Shiranui Flare, playing the rhythm game Pop'n music, followed by a live vocal performance of the song 'Daikenkai' with another VTuber, Omaru Polka.

scenes.description: Shiranui Flare plays 'Second Heaven' in the rhythm game Pop'n music. The song is playing in the background.
